title: Dalmia Bharat is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Dalmia Bharat is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Dalmia Bharat are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Faridabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Dalmia Bharat:
Dalmia Bharat is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dalmia Bharat!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
